hero.headline: Authentic Qatari Cuisine
hero.subheadline: An extraordinary dining experience blending Gulf heritage with refined Mediterranean flavors

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: Discover our finest Qatari and Mediterranean dishes

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Chef Alfreej
about.story1: Chef Alfreej blends the authenticity of Qatari cuisine with Khaliji flair, delivering an unforgettable dining experience.
about.story2: We believe great food brings people together, telling ancestral stories in a refined, contemporary style. Every dish is a celebration of Gulf heritage and an open invitation to all who love authentic flavors.

order.title: Order via Delivery Partners
order.subtitle: Fast delivery to your door
order.description: Enjoy your favorite Chef Alfreej meals at home. Delivery in approximately 35 minutes to most areas across Qatar.
